feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: ࿔˚𓇢𓆸✺𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝑮𝒖𝒂𝒓𝒅𝒊𝒂𝒏'𝒔 𝑴𝒆𝒓𝒄𝒚✺⚘.⋆˚࿔
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,656Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: The Batfamily encounters a runaway teenager who refuses all help until Bruce makes one call. His godmother arrives, wearing a black mask with painted closed eyes and a V-smile. No one can see her face. No one can see where she's looking. The Batfamily must read her through voice and body language alone and for Cassandra Cain, who reads everything through eyes and micro-expressions, she's a nightmare to understand.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Another Perspective
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,914Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 543

Summary: A clash of opposing plans causes Batman to accidentally be doused with a hybrid of not-quite-Fear Toxin and Ivy's pheromones. In order to cope with the opposing influences, his brain convinces him that the four Rogues who were keyed to them - Scarecrow, Ivy, Harley Quinn, and Riddler - have been deaged into children. Obviously he'll have to bring them home and look after them until an antidote is made. Meanwhile, by order of the Batkids in order to NOT break Batman's mind, said Rogues are forced to play along.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Batfamily Watches: A Lesson in Suffering
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,338Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: Or: Rose Wilson's Revenge Is A Gift That Keeps On Giving Author's Note: I know consent and chemistry did a lot of heavy lifiting here, but Bruce wasn't manipulated or groomed by Slade despite the big age gap.

entry.title: (‧₊˚ ♡⋅𝕋𝕙𝕖 𝔹𝕒𝕥𝕔𝕒𝕧𝕖'𝕤 𝔹𝕖𝕤𝕥-𝕂𝕖𝕡𝕥 𝕊𝕖𝕔𝕣𝕖𝕥𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ☾.)ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,467Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 2

Summary: When a late-night patrol ends early due to a Gotham blizzard, the Batfamily discovers Bruce Wayne, the stoic, brooding, emotionally constipated Batman, in a homemade blanket fort, hugging an arm-length pillow, wrapped in two very specific blankets, with the heater running. And he's been doing this since high school. Chaos ensues.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Batfamily & Bruce Wayne
  • Fluff
  • Humor
  • Found Family
  • Bruce Wayne Needs a Hug (and finally gets one
  • on his own terms)
  • Blanket Forts
  • Sleep Hygiene
  • Emotional Vulnerability
  • Crack Treated Seriously
  • Everyone Loves Bruce Actually

entry.title: Batman And Harley Quinn Under The Red Hood.
entry.summary:
Author: Jakebob555

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,182Chapters: 7/20Kudos: 5

Summary: One year post the Funeral of Jason Todd Bruce Wayne and Harleen Quinzel's friendship is going strong. With the former Clown Princess of Crime now out of Arkham and attempting to return to Civilian Life. Elsewhere Tim Drake continues training under Bruce to take on the mantle of Robin, things take a dark turn though when a new foe taking up the name and mantle of the Red Hood appears on the streets of Gotham hunting down members of the Joker's gang as well as the local Drug Trade. Who is this mysterious new Vigilante and why does he seem to know Batman?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: I have emotional motion sickness
entry.summary:
Author: filmdarling1304

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,962Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 153

Summary: Why is Clark out to get him? Hasn’t he been a good boyfriend? Hasn’t he? Maybe he hasn’t, maybe he’s so sick in the brain that even Clark can sense it. Maybe by fattening him up, he would get back at Bruce for clearly ruining his life. Maybe- “Bruce? Breakfast is ready.” Clark’s grating voice was outside the bathroom door.   Unknown to anybody, Bruce had been struggling with food for nearly two decades.Unknown to anybody, Bruce stopped taking his medication.What follows is a man who couldn't stop himself from falling into a hole of intense disordered eating, paranoia, and unhealthy coping mechanisms that could cost him his life.That is, if the ones who love him don't stop him first.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 109,878Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 60

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.   i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Familial Dimensions
entry.summary:
Author: natcat5

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,954Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 140

entry.title: Chapter 4; Dark Age
entry.summary:
Author: Corvix_Ailuranthrope_4313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,210Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Point Break, the meteor that had hit the Planet Earth, had almost destroyed the world in its entirety, there was chaos everywhere now, no law, no order, monsters had ruled the streets with no fear of the dark, and this Batman was on his own with nothing but his wits and willpower, would he survive in this chaos and help Gotham rebuild? Or will Gotham finally fall once and for all this time around?

entry.title: Our Monkey, Our Circus
entry.summary:
Author: gardenfire45

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,696Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 196

Summary: Alfred wants the Batfamily to get along, So Bruce made a Groupchat hoping everyone to behave. (He put too much hope into it, no one is behaving). It end up as we all expected, Chaos... At least it's entertaining...  -   Harleen: Monkeys are terrifying creature ngl Harleen: did you know Chimpanzees rips off the balls of their rivals or enemy? Harleen: gruesome shit.   Jason: You learn new things every day   Tim: I do not need to read that at fucking 10 pm in patrol night.   Steph: Humans can do it too if they're not a coward or afraid to be called gay Steph: but people are cowards, Start ripping off the enemies balls!!! Be the dominant Chimpanzees!!!   Cass: on it.

entry.title: It’s Not Who I Am Underneath
entry.summary:
Author: kazoojisoo

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,151Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Bruce was supposed to go to the circus—a nice night out, far away from Gotham’s endless crime and corruption. Unfortunately, he forgets to set his alarm. Alfred is going to be so upset. Well, it’s not like Bruce could’ve missed much.Or: an AU where the Batfamily only know each other as vigilantes

entry.title: An official list of songs forbidden in the Batcave, written by Bruce Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: moon_will_sing

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,577Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: It pains me to say that we’ve arrived at a point where this is necessary. That being said, this list is now the law. Any attempts to find loopholes of any kind in the following rules shall have serious consequences.

  • Batfamily Members & Batfamily Members (DCU)

entry.title: Hiding with the animals
entry.summary:
Author: Dev_Hum4n

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,262Chapters: 2/20Kudos: 8

Summary: In a world where hybrids are known of—but never truly seen—Bruce Wayne never expected one to be so close to home. As secrets begin to surface, he’s forced to confront a hidden truth: the people he loves most may not be entirely human. And in Gotham, being different has never been safe. Therefore, he must try and protect them from everything they’ve been through, even though he knows it’s going to be extremely difficult.

entry.title: The Madness He Chose
entry.summary:
Author: Andromeda_Child

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,049Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: She is not something that happened to him. She is something he walked toward, eyes open, cape trailing, every careful rule he built himself on crumbling at the sound of her laugh. She blows up buildings and he pulls her from the rubble. She kisses him like a threat and he lets her. She is Gotham's worst joke and his best-kept secret, and somewhere between the rooftops and the wreckage, Bruce Wayne stopped pretending he wanted her to stop. A collection of one-shots. Dark. Electric. Occasionally tender in ways neither of them would admit to.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Tell Me Something I Don’t Know
entry.summary:
Author: LocustPocus

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,839Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 238

Summary: 6 times a Justice League member prompted Batman to share something about his family, and 1 time he helped a fellow member have a realisation of their own.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • I miss her please bring her home

entry.title: Cursed Child
entry.summary:
Author: J4YYYZ

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,346Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 626

Summary: Bruce gets de-aged into a 16-year old after being hit by an alien weapon from an attempted invasion. The 16 year old who trained under the LOA.The 16 year old who ran away from Alfred.The 16 year old who was manipulated into something else.The 16 year old who was made a weapon.The 16 year old who never had a childhood. Bruce tries to forget the days of when he trained under Ra's, but small habits and reflexes he thought were long gone start to resurface, along with memories being freshly remembered as if it was yesterday. It haunts him slowly, eating him out from the inside before taking action after playing with its food. EDIT: currently being rewritten. Read chapter notes to see what is and what isn’t. Sorry for the confusion, i thought it was clear when it was just the notes. EDIT AGAIN: JUST TO WARN PEOPLE. I am very slow to update-
